missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XII — platform above O'aka at the North Wharf; collect before leaving the wharf
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XIII — room west of the red doors in Guadosalam; collect before story advances
Hi-Potion ×2 — upper balcony of Seymour's mansion; collect before entering the purple doors
Lightning Marble ×8 — corridor to the Farplane; check left wall immediately upon entering

subLocations.name: North Wharf
subLocations.prose: Rikku rejoins the party on the riverbank. Before following the path west, grab Primer XII from the platform above O'aka's stall — you cannot return once you leave the wharf. There is also an Ether in the chest near the bench.

subLocations.name: Road to Guadosalam
subLocations.prose: Two chests on the trail leading into town. The Antidotes are useful Customize fodder — don't sell them.

subLocations.name: Guadosalam
subLocations.prose: Mostly story — Seymour's feast, the Farplane, and the proposal. Explore the winding backstreets before entering the red double doors; there are chests with a Mega-Potion, Elixir, and 3,000 gil tucked around the western room, plus Primer XIII on the floor. In the corridor leading to the Farplane, check the left wall for a hidden chest with Lightning Marbles. On the Farplane itself, speak to Wakka and Lulu to trigger their scenes — this upgrades the Brotherhood with Strength +10%, Sensor, and Waterstrike. Notice that everyone except Tidus sees a loved one — his father's spirit appears to him instead, visually changed in a way that quietly confirms what Jecht has become. You already know, but it's the game's first explicit on-screen acknowledgement.

subLocations.name: Seymour's Mansion
subLocations.prose: Ascend either staircase to the upper balcony and collect the Hi-Potions from the hidden chest before entering the purple double doors for Seymour's scene.

subLocations.name: Corridor to the Farplane
subLocations.prose: Move left immediately upon entering the corridor — before joining the party on the stairs — to find the hidden chest with Lightning Marbles. Easy to walk past if you follow the party straight up.
